layers.name: APIs & Backend Logic
layers.note: edge fns route through platform-gateway or are code-verified exempt

layers.name: Security & RLS
layers.note: gateway policy + verified-tenant key; bypass = cross-tenant exploitable site

layers.name: Rate Limiting
layers.note: rate-limit keyed on verifiedHiveId; bypass = spoofable rate-key

layers.name: CI/CD & Version Control
layers.note: run_platform_checks is the change chokepoint; bypass = unclassified change

layers.name: Database & Storage
layers.note: canonical v_*_truth is the value chokepoint; bypass = raw-source read / drift

layers.name: Frontend
layers.note: rendered value must map to a canonical source; bypass = surface displaying a non-canonical value

layers.name: Error Tracking & Logs
layers.note: structured ndjson logger (beginRequest/log) is the convergence; bypass = edge fn not emitting structured logs (partial-adoption ratchet)

layers.name: Availability & Recovery
layers.note: /health is the liveness convergence; bypass = edge fn without a /health probe (frozen-baseline ratchet)

layers.name: Caching & CDN
layers.note: no cleanly-countable prevention-chokepoint bypass meter (cache denom unknown / prod-infra is external)

layers.name: Hosting & Deployment
layers.note: no cleanly-countable prevention-chokepoint bypass meter (cache denom unknown / prod-infra is external)

layers.name: Cloud & Compute
layers.note: no cleanly-countable prevention-chokepoint bypass meter (cache denom unknown / prod-infra is external)

layers.name: Load Balancing & Scaling
layers.note: no cleanly-countable prevention-chokepoint bypass meter (cache denom unknown / prod-infra is external)

_note: G2: the §14.6 Gateway axis derived from REAL bypass reports. measured = instrument; by-absence = no chokepoint (honest frontier). D+F bypass = the data-gateway target G1 drives to 0.
